corrections.location: v.2, first word after verse number

corrections.note: The page shows a full stop and paragraph mark, not a raised middle dot.

The page has a raised middle dot after κυρίαν.
The second sigla group is printed AΓQΓ, not AQΓ.
The siglum is printed Βαββ, not Βαβ.
The apparatus reads κυριειαν, matching the body lemma κυρίαν.

notes: Running head and page number match. Main body is largely correct; only punctuation/paragraph marks and one omitted marginal letter noticed. Apparatus has a few sigla/wordform issues.
